view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the '5-session package purchase' scenario, but the evidence does not provide any concrete results or outcomes from this simulation. While the expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a clear failure report, there is no evidence presented that demonstrates the execution or results of this scenario. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
